name: Canvas Folding Outdoor Portable Beach Lounge Chair Cream - Threshold™
description:
Add a stylish touch to your beach accessories or outside decor with this Canvas Folding Portable Beach Lounge Chair from Threshold™. Supported by a steel frame, the portable beach lounge chair features a soft canvas upholstery to relax in absolute comfort. Designed with a shoulder strap for easy carrying around, it's crafted with a weather- and rust-resistant frame to withstand the outdoor elements.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
